calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Of Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Aug-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Marc T. Cefalu, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Bank of the West,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Lester's Nursery, Landscaping and Construction, Inc. and Willard Strom, an individual,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $29,274.10
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $3,500.00
Costs: $1,123.43
Total Judgment in the amount of $33,897.53

Judgment of Possession for Plaintiff of the equipment described in Exhibit A but if the equipment is recovered and sold, defendants shall be entitled to a credit for the net proceeds of the sale.
Judgment signed in open court.
